Costume Designer for Stage, Screen & Storytelling

Creating memorable characters through fabric and imagination

View Portfolio Get in Touch

"Fashion is the armor to survive everyday life."

— Bill Cunningham

Yordan The Designer

With over a decade of experience in costume design for both stage and screen, I blend historical accuracy with creative vision to bring characters to life through fabric and form.

My approach combines meticulous research with innovative techniques, working closely with directors, actors, and production teams to ensure each costume not only looks stunning but also serves the narrative and enables authentic performances.

Every project begins with deep research into the time period, character psychology, and practical performance needs. I'm passionate about sustainable practices, incorporating vintage materials and environmentally conscious processes whenever possible.
